seoTitle: Turners Beach vs Turners Marsh — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Turners Beach and Turners Marsh. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Turners Beach vs Turners Marsh: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Turners Beach and Turners Marsh.
heading: Turners Beach vs Turners Marsh — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Turners Beach, Tasmania and Turners Marsh, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Turners Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Turners Marsh (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Turners Beach or Turners Marsh safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Turners Beach has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Turners Marsh scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Turners Beach scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Turners Marsh scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Turners Beach or Turners Marsh?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Turners Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
